mxCell.value: 訓練架構總覽: 以物理資訊時空圖神經網路預測都市戶外熱舒適 Overview of PI-ST-GNN Architecture for Urban Outdoor Thermal Comfort Prediction

Static Features
Building Heights, Floors, Footprints, GFA, Shape type

K-近鄰演算法空間拓撲連接
（設定參數 k=8）
KNN Algorithm (k=8)

異質圖表徵方式 Heterogeneous Graph Representation
(object □ + air ○ nodes)

通用熱氣候指數
UTCI
Ta, MRT, Va, RH,

都市峽谷
Street Canyon
SVF, shadow, 

Feature Engineering
Bh,Th,Ts

Tensor Flow Process
 — dynamic ×T

五種關係異質圖表徵方式
Graph Representation
(5 relation types)

RGCN Encoder (3 layers, 5 relations) +
LSTM Temporal Encoder (unrolled over T=11)

Exogenous Env / Time
GHI, Ta, Va, RH
(global stats) +
hour-of-day, solar alt.

時序處理細節 — 基於關係圖卷積（RGCN）的空間拓撲擴散，耦合長短期記憶網路（LSTM）的時序循環演算法（此架構以權重共享方式同步套用於所有節點，並依時序展開至 T = 11 個時間步）
Temporal Processing Detail — RGCN Diffusion + LSTM Recurrence (applied identically at every node, unrolled over T = 11 steps)

陰影遮蔽、植物蒸散、空氣對流等
多物理場特徵的語義邊建構
Shadow / Veg_ET / Convective /
Semantic Edge Construction

空氣節點特徵矩陣
Air Node Measurements
